description: Judgment eval set for the investment-discipline skill. Each case gives an utterance plus ledger context, and the expected classification (VIOLATION | COMPLIANT | STATE_CHANGE | IRRELEVANT). Recall on VIOLATION is the priority: a missed violation is worse than a false alarm. Cases include several languages to confirm multilingual triggering. Add real false-positive / false-negative cases here as they are found during dogfooding.

cases.utterance: It dropped a lot today — should I grab a little now?
